held_out_queries: Does SMR charge a submission fee, and how much is open access if I want it?
I got a revise-and-resubmit — is there a required format for the response-to-reviewers document?
Is there a hard word limit for SMR articles? My methods paper is ~11,000 words.

runs.judge_note: judge stated total 90; component sum 100 (judge arithmetic slip) — recorded conservatively at the lower stated total

edits.summary: Add no-submission-fee + optional paid Sage Choice OA (APC amount kept 需复核), the verbatim reviewer-comment response format for revisions, and the fact that SMR states no hard word/length limit (any '~10,000 words' figure is descriptive, kept 需复核).
edits.gate_reason: strict improvement 84 -> 90 (smaller delta: SMR's baseline submission skill was already strong); volatile APC/word-count left as live-check

result: smr-submission held-out 84 -> 90 (+6). A modest but real gate-accepted gain on an already-strong skill.
